using System;
using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public enum BenchmarkStatus { Pending, Running, Completed, Failed, Resumed }

public sealed class BenchmarkRun
{
    public Guid Id { get; init; } = Guid.NewGuid();
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; init; } = null!;
    public BenchmarkStatus Status { get; private set; } = BenchmarkStatus.Pending;
    public double[]? Results { get; private set; }
    public string? Error { get; private set; }
    public DateTime? StartedAt { get; private set; }
    public DateTime? CompletedAt { get; private set; }
    public int RetryCount { get; private set; }

    public void MarkRunning() { Status = BenchmarkStatus.Running; StartedAt = DateTime.UtcNow; }
    public void MarkCompleted(double[] results) { Results = results; Status = BenchmarkStatus.Completed; CompletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow; }
    public void MarkFailed(string error) { Error = error; Status = BenchmarkStatus.Failed; CompletedAt = DateTime.UtcNow; }
    public void MarkResumed() { Status = BenchmarkStatus.Resumed; }
    public void IncrementRetry() { RetryCount++; }
}

public interface IBenchmarkRunner
{
    Task<BenchmarkRun> RunAsync(B
